zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alexander de Percy於1240年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親Sir William de Percy25歲，母親Nichola de Stuteville25歲。他於大約1298年與Elizabeth Collville在英國英格蘭越可爾吉爾達爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alexander de Percy于1240年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲Sir William de Percy25岁，母亲Nichola de Stuteville25岁。他于大约1298年与Elizabeth Collville在英国英格兰越可爾吉爾達爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alexander de Percy was born in 1240, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William de Percy, was 25 and his mother, Nichola de Stuteville, was 25. He married Elizabeth Collville about 1298, in Kildale, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alexander de Percy est né en 1240, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de Percy, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Nichola de Stuteville, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Collville environ 1298, à Kildale, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alexander de Percy 1240 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Percy 25 und seine Mutter Nichola de Stuteville 25. Er hat um 1298 in Kildale, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Collville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander de Percy è nato il nel 1240 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William de Percy, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Nichola de Stuteville, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Collville circa 1298, nel Kildale, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander de Percyが1240年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William de Percyは25歳，母Nichola de Stutevilleは25歳であった。約1298年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアキルダルでElizabeth Collvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander de Percy(이)가 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Percy(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Nichola de Stuteville(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1298년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킬데일에서 Elizabeth Collville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander de Percy nasceu em 1240, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William de Percy, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Nichola de Stuteville, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Collville aproximadamente 1298, em Kildale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alexander de Percy родился в 1240 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William de Percy было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Nichola de Stuteville, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Collville около 1298 г. в местности каилдеил, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alexander de Percy nació en 1240, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William de Percy, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Nichola de Stuteville, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Collville aproximadamente 1298, en Kildale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
